one_liner: Systeme.io offers a self-serve REST API (API-key auth) for managing contacts, tags, funnels, and courses, plus an official MCP server for AI-agent access.

auth_methods.notes: Public API key generated in profile settings under 'Public API keys', sent via X-API-Key header on every request.

self_serve_notes: API access is available on all plans including the free tier; developers can generate a key directly from dashboard settings with no approval process.

api_surface.notes: REST API covering contacts, tags, courses, funnels, pages, and webhooks; cursor-based pagination; OpenAPI spec referenced via llms.txt

evidence.supports: Describes API key generation, X-API-Key header authentication, rate limiting, and REST conventions.
Explains self-serve creation of public API key in account settings.
Details on using the public API, available on all plans including free tier.
Example REST endpoint for retrieving contacts collection with filtering and pagination.
Confirms MCP server availability and free plan API/MCP access details.

flags: MCP keys expire after 90 days and are limited to two active keys at a time, requiring periodic rotation.
Official MCP server currently covers only contacts, newsletters, and funnels—narrower than the full REST API surface.
